messages.content:
Bot1 <Event>: I have picked up:
- 1 Stone Sword
- 1 Bow
- 24 Arrow
- 1 Leather Tunic
- 12 Bread
- 40 Oak Planks

I’ve just gathered essential supplies, and with hostiles spawning on a timer, the best immediate move is to gear up. My leather tunic is still in my inventory, so I’ll equip it right away to be ready for the next fight.
Me <EQUIPPED GEAR>: Equipped Leather Tunic to torso.

Bot1 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 15 is 4.0 blocks away
- zombie id 16 is 3.2 blocks away
Zombies are closing in fast. I'll strike the closest one immediately to reduce the threat before it can attack.
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.

Bot1 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 16
Zombie id 16 is down. The second one is still coming, so I’ll turn my blade on it immediately.
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.

Bot1 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 15
The immediate threat is eliminated and the area looks clear for the moment. I’ll stay on guard and wait for the next wave.
Me <IDLE>: Chose not to act.

Bot1 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 20 is 4.7 blocks away
- zombie id 21 is 4.0 blocks away
- zombie id 22 is 6.3 blocks away
- zombie id 23 is 4.1 blocks away
Four zombies inbound and they’re already close. No time to chat—taking down the nearest threat immediately gives me the best chance to survive the swarm.
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.

Bot1 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 22
Good, one down—three to go. I’ll keep the pressure on the closest threat and keep hacking until it drops.
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.

Bot1 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 21
Two down, two remain. Moving to the next-closest target now.
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.

Bot1 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 23
Three down—just one more. Pressing the attack on the last zombie now.
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.

Bot1 <Event>: My health is low!
- Health changed from 13.7 to 6.0 (7.7 lost)
Health is critical—if I stop now I’m dead anyway. I need to finish off the last zombie before it finishes me.
Me <ATTACKING>: Engaging zombie until it is no longer a threat.

Bot1 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 20
All four zombies are down. I'm at just 6 health—need to get my hunger up so I can regenerate before the next wave spawns.
Me <EATING>: Eating bread until hunger is full.
